reconciliation.interpretation: The global VLLM_BATCH_INVARIANT=1 flag costs ~51.39% locally (deployed 460.12 -> strict 223.65, ratio 0.486), reproducing PR #122's 51.78% blanket-pin cost and matching ubel #470 (234.47 official / 221.16 local). The in-harness 'strict' 457.55 (stark #472) is within 2*sigma_hw of the local DEPLOYED-no-flag 460.12, NOT the local global-flag strict 223.65 -- i.e. the 457.55 measurement does NOT carry the global-flag tax, so it was almost certainly a surgical attention-only strict change, NOT the global env flag. Firing the global-flag GO config would land the official draw near ~234 TPS (naive extrapolation), far below the ~457.5 the human approved on #474.
